ibs_n.name: Internal Bar Strength look back n bars
ibs_n.comment: ibs_n = (close - lowest(n)) / (highest(n) - lowest(n)) with n = IBS_LOOKBACK

is_fvg.name: Is Fair Value Gap
is_fvg.comment: is_fvg = True if (high_prev > low_curr) or (low_prev < high_curr) else False

ulti_osci.name: Ultimate Oscillator
ulti_osci.comment: Ultimate Oscillator = ta.ultimate_oscillator(high, low, close, length=n) with n = VOLATILITY_LOOKBACK

atr.name: Average True Range
atr.comment: atr = ta.atr(high, low, close, length=n) with n = VOLATILITY_LOOKBACK

adx.name: Average Directional Index
adx.comment: adx = ta.adx(high, low, close, length=n) with n = ADX_VOLATILITY_LOOKBACKLOOKBACK

streak.name: Up/Down Streak
streak.comment: up_streak = 0 if direction != direction_lag1 else direction + up_streak_lag1
